answer:
Meta offers an official, first-party Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for ads at `mcp.facebook.com/ads` [1]. It is designed for single advertisers and is accessible directly within supported AI clients like Claude, ChatGPT, and Perplexity [1].

For agencies or power users requiring advanced features, multiple open-source MCP servers are available. Notable options include Pipeboard’s remote server at `https://meta-ads.mcp.pipeboard.co/` [2], which supports cross-platform ad management, and the `byadsco/meta-ads-mcp` server, which provides multi-tenant agency capabilities and aligns its naming conventions with Meta’s official MCP [1].

results.title: GitHub - pipeboard-co/meta-ads-mcp: MCP server to manage Facebook and Instagram Ads (Meta Ads) · GitHub
